description: REST APIで登録処理を実装したい。クライアントからJSONを受け取ってDBに登録する基本的な流れを知りたい。
input: REST APIでJSONを受け取ってDBに登録する処理を作りたい

answer_correctness.reason: The Actual Output mentions Jackson2BodyConverter as the component responsible for JSON body conversion, which matches the first expected fact. The Actual Output mentions JerseyJaxRsHandlerListFactory as a way to auto-configure handlers, but does not address the pattern of implementing JaxRsHandlerListFactory to extend MIME type support. Only one of the two expected facts is clearly covered.
